---
title: Freedom index
subtitle: AE 11
---

```{r}
#| label: load-packages
#| message: false
library(tidyverse)
library(mapproj)
```

## Freedom index

Data:

```{r}
#| label: load-data
freedom <- read_csv("data/freedom-2022.csv", na = c("", "-")) |>
  drop_na()

world_map <- map_data("world") |> as_tibble()
```

Plot:

```{r}
#| label: map
# add code here
```
